result.stdout:
Usage: multiagent-setup <project-name> [github-org]

Arguments:
  project-name  Name for the new workspace directory
  github-org    GitHub org or username (default: your authenticated gh account)

Options:
  -h, --help    Show this help
  -v, --version Show version
